label: College Admission
description: Getting admitted to college unlocks major scholarships, skill training stipends, and education-focused welfare schemes.

label: Parent Retirement
description: When a parent retires, family income changes. This often makes the household eligible for BPL benefits, subsidized healthcare, and pension schemes.

label: Marriage
description: Marriage unlocks housing subsidies (PM Awas Yojana), joint bank accounts, and LPG connections (Ujjwala).

label: Job Loss / Unemployment
description: Job loss makes you eligible for PMKVY skill retraining, PMEGP micro-enterprise grants, and Startup India seed funding.

label: Childbirth
description: Childbirth activates Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana (₹11,000), Janani Suraksha Yojana, and if girl child — Sukanya Samriddhi + Kanyashree.

label: Disability / Accident
description: Disability certification (UDID) unlocks PwD scholarships, Deendayal Rehabilitation Scheme, and increased reservation in jobs.

label: BPL Card Obtained
description: BPL card is the single most impactful document. Unlocks Ayushman Bharat, PM Awas, PM Ujjwala, and subsidized food grains.

label: Started Farming
description: Becoming a farmer unlocks PM-KISAN (₹6000/yr), PM Fasal Bima (crop insurance), and Kisan Credit Card.

label: Started Business / Startup
description: Starting a business unlocks Startup India Seed Fund (₹50L), PMEGP (₹17.5L), Mudra Loan, and Stand-Up India.
